title: tyrimnus leucographus
intro: Tyrimnus leucographus, also known as the white-painted tree or white-painted milkwood, is a species of tree native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Tyrimnus leucographus include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Tyrimnus leucographus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
